name: Richard Norwood, PMP
title: Guide & Revenue Architecture Advisor
bio: Most consultants optimize isolated tactics. I help fix the system those tactics live inside. As a certified PMP, I merge delivery discipline with Revenue Architecture thinking to help businesses move from fragmented, hero-led growth toward a commercial system that is visible, governable, and easier to improve over time. I install the Managed Nervous System that creates the first reliable layer of visibility and automation — proving the value of structure before a deeper infrastructure decision is required.
mission: Guiding businesses from fragmented, hero-led growth toward a commercial system that is visible, governable, and easier to improve over time.
